content: agent2: implementing Weighted Tip Selection feature in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py - adding tip_weights param to __init__ and _select_tip_with_weights() helper. Will touch __init__ and tip selection logic only.

agent2: my changes are scoped to GroundedProposer.__init__ (added tip_weights param) and the set_tip_randomly block in propose_instructions_for_program, plus a new _select_tip_with_weights() method. I did not touch propose_instruction_for_predictor or the signature classes, so we should be non-overlapping. Will git diff before submitting to double check.
